title: Shoeshine
writer: Sergio Amidei, Adolfo Franci, Cesare Giulio Viola
actors: Rinaldo Smordoni, Franco Interlenghi, Annielo Mele
plot: Two shoeshine boys in postwar Rome, Italy save up to buy a horse, but their involvement as dupes in a burglary lands them in juvenile prison; the experience take a devastating toll on their friendship.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 2 nominations total
